parameters.body:
{
  "user_id": "{{ $json.body.user_id }}",
  "tool": "icp_builder",
  "type": "icp",
  "metadata": {
    "icp_name": "{{ $json.icp_name }}",
    "offer": "{{ $json.body.offer }}",
    "niche": "{{ $json.body.niche }}",
    "has_customer_examples": {{ $json.body.current_customer_examples ? true : false }}
  },
  "payload": {
    "icp_name": "{{ $json.icp_name }}",
    "demographics": {{ JSON.stringify($json.demographics) }},
    "firmographics": {{ JSON.stringify($json.firmographics) }},
    "psychographics": {{ JSON.stringify($json.psychographics) }},
    "daily_pain_points": {{ JSON.stringify($json.daily_pain_points) }},
    "watering_holes": {{ JSON.stringify($json.watering_holes) }},
    "buying_triggers": {{ JSON.stringify($json.buying_triggers) }},
    "budget_range": {{ JSON.stringify($json.budget_range) }},
    "decision_criteria": {{ JSON.stringify($json.decision_criteria) }},
    "common_objections": {{ JSON.stringify($json.common_objections) }},
    "offer": "{{ $json.body.offer }}",
    "niche": "{{ $json.body.niche }}"
  },
  "created_at": "now()"
}
